Date: {{date}}

Dear {{name}},

This Non-Disclosure Agreement records the confidentiality, information security, data protection, intellectual property, and responsible-use obligations applicable to you as an associate of {{company_name}} in the role of {{role}} under the {{department}} department. This document is linked to reference number {{reference_id}} and applies to all employment, internship, trainee, consulting, contract, project, vendor-support, or other approved engagement categories maintained by the company.

The company record identifies the association as {{role_context}}. {{timeline_statement}} {{status_statement}} This agreement applies during onboarding, active work, remote or hybrid work, access to company systems, project participation, handover, exit, and post-engagement periods wherever confidential information or company-controlled information is involved.

Reference ID{{reference_id}}
Department{{department}}
Joining Date{{joining_date}}
Date Of Exit{{exit_date}}
Reporting Manager{{manager}}
Lifecycle Status{{status}}
BGV Contact{{bgv_email}}
Verification URL{{verify_url}}

Confidential Information

Confidential information includes, without limitation, business plans, client information, candidate information, employee information, project documents, product plans, designs, software code, credentials, financial information, pricing, proposals, processes, research, internal communications, operational data, technical material, personal data, vendor information, documentation, templates, automation workflows, AI prompts, system configurations, and any information marked or reasonably understood to be confidential, proprietary, restricted, or sensitive.

Obligations Of The Associate

  • Use confidential information only for authorized work assigned by {{company_name}} and only within the scope of {{role}} or other approved duties.
  • Do not copy, publish, disclose, transmit, store externally, upload, download, transfer, or share confidential information without written authorization.
  • Protect credentials, documents, files, devices, systems, repositories, communication channels, and collaboration tools from unauthorized access or misuse.
  • Immediately report suspected loss, leak, unauthorized access, policy breach, phishing incident, malware incident, credential exposure, or misuse of confidential information.
  • Comply with instructions regarding data handling, device security, access control, encryption, retention, deletion, archival, and information security.
  • Return, transfer, or delete company information when requested or when the engagement ends, and complete access removal or handover confirmations as instructed.

Digital Systems, AI Tools And Future-Ready Workflows

Company-approved digital systems, cloud tools, automation tools, analytics tools, AI-assisted tools, repositories, communication platforms, and collaboration environments must be used responsibly and only for authorized company work. Confidential information must not be entered into public, personal, unapproved, or unmanaged systems, including AI tools or external storage, unless the company has approved such use and appropriate security controls are in place.

You must not attempt to bypass access controls, export protected information, scrape internal records, misuse credentials, disable logs, remove audit trails, or use company information to train, enrich, publish, or commercialize any external model, product, dataset, template, process, or service without written authorization.

Personal Data And Regulatory Care

Personal data relating to employees, candidates, clients, vendors, partners, or users must be handled with care, confidentiality, purpose limitation, access limitation, and retention discipline. You must process personal data only for authorized company purposes and must not disclose, copy, retain, or transfer such data outside approved channels.

Intellectual Property And Work Product

Documents, code, designs, configurations, reports, workflows, templates, notes, processes, research, datasets, automation scripts, and other work products created, modified, reviewed, or contributed as part of assigned company work must be handled according to company policy and applicable intellectual property obligations. Nothing in this agreement grants ownership rights, license rights, or permission to use company intellectual property except as strictly required for authorized company work.

Permitted Disclosure And Exclusions

Confidentiality obligations do not apply to information that is publicly available without breach of this agreement, independently developed without use of company confidential information, or lawfully received from a third party without restriction. If disclosure is required by law, regulation, court order, or authorized government process, you must notify the company promptly unless legally prohibited, and must limit disclosure to the minimum required.

Return, Destruction And Access Removal

Upon request or at the end of the engagement, you must return, delete, transfer, or securely destroy all company information, files, notes, credentials, copies, devices, and materials in your possession or control. You must complete handover, access removal, asset return, deletion confirmation, repository transfer, and any audit or compliance step requested by the company.

Breach, Remedies And Survival

Any unauthorized disclosure, retention, publication, transfer, copying, misuse, credential sharing, data leak, or security breach may cause business, legal, reputational, financial, or operational harm to the company. The company may take appropriate action under policy, contract, applicable law, and available remedies. These obligations continue during and after the engagement for as long as the information remains confidential or protected.

Verification And Record Integrity

{{digital_record_statement}} {{verification_statement}} This agreement should be read together with company policies, project instructions, access rules, and any role-specific security or confidentiality requirements communicated by {{manager}} or authorized representatives.

By continuing with the association, accessing company information, using company systems, or performing assigned work, you acknowledge and agree to comply with the confidentiality, information security, data protection, intellectual property, and responsible-use obligations stated above.

This agreement is issued and tracked under reference number {{reference_id}} and may be verified through {{verify_url}} or by contacting {{bgv_email}}.
